tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Block_Ubuntu_Exfil_HTTPS"
        set uuid 80ba9ef4-2933-51f1-c254-db278ef890f9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS" "HTTP"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address UbuntuComputer
config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set uuid 7d02610c-2933-51f1-d6fa-1def5740e3ad
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 2
set name "Block_Ubuntu_Exfil_HTTPS"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set logtraffic all
set comments "Deny outbound web exfiltration from compromised Ubuntu host 192.168.1.3"
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) # set name "Block_Ubuntu_Exfil_HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) # set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) # set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) # set comments "Deny outbound web exfiltration from compr omised Ubuntu host 192.168.1.3"

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy 2
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block_Ubuntu_Exfil_HTTPS"
        set uuid 80ba9ef4-2933-51f1-c254-db278ef890f9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS" "HTTP"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Deny outbound web exfiltration from compromised Ubuntu host 192.168.1.3"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
